domain_summary: ArchMap DSL and renderer: align the existing parser, canonical model, diagnostics, and views with the v0.1 specs through alternating Claude/Codex development.
repo_boundaries: src/: parser, normalization, validation, render, layout, view implementations.
test/: Vitest coverage for parser, render, layout, icons, views, 3D scene, canonical adapter.
docs/specs/v0.1/: authoritative v0.1 specs; read before changing semantics.
docs/aof/STATUS.md and .aof/: shared handoff/runtime state for Claude/Codex alternation.
examples/: demo ArchMap source and browser examples.
protected_areas: Do not rewrite vendored specs in docs/specs/v0.1/ unless explicitly asked.
Do not break existing parse()/render() array-model compatibility without an explicit migration decision.
Do not remove existing examples or public exports without tests and a handoff note.
Do not run destructive git commands unless the human explicitly requests them.
verification_entrypoints: Run npm run typecheck for TypeScript/API shape.
Run npm test for parser/layout/render/view regressions.
Run npm run build before handing off broad or public API changes.
Update .aof tasks/goals or docs/aof/STATUS.md with handoff state before ending an agent session.
release_constraints: Keep incremental migration order: parse -> normalize -> diagnostics -> overview.
Warnings must not block render; errors should be trustworthy and spec-grounded.
Renderer legibility must remain protected: no edge over node and no shared endpoints regressions.
Existing browser-only usage and optional 3D/icons should remain opt-in compatible.
human_owner: Project owner in this Codex/Claude alternating development thread.
approval_boundary: Agents may make scoped implementation, test, and .aof state updates for the agreed stages. Ask before changing project direction, deleting public API, rewriting specs, or making destructive git/history changes.
